zh.Barnoldswick, Lancashire, England, Unite: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾巴諾爾斯維其可
zh.lifeSummary: Katherine Riley於1345年出生。她於1370年與Richard Lister在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1403年在英國德比夏爾德比享年58歲。

zh-hans.Barnoldswick, Lancashire, England, Unite: 英国英格兰藍卡爾巴諾爾斯維其可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Katherine Riley于1345年出生。她于1370年与Richard Lister在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1403年在英国德比夏爾德比享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Riley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name chiefly from High Ryley in Accrington (Lancashire) and Riley in Kirkburton, which was in the manor of Wakefield (Yorkshire). In some cases the name may derive from Riley Farm in Eyam (Derbyshire), Royley in Royton (Lancashire), or Rylah in Scarcliffe (Derbyshire). The placenames all come from Old English rȳge ‘rye’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

Irish: from Ó Raghailligh ‘descendant of Raghailleach’, Old Irish Roghallach. This is the name of a chieftain family in Cavan, related to the O'Rourkes. In Anglicized form it has also been confused with Ó Raithile found in Munster, usually Anglicized as O'Rahilly or Rahilly . See O'Reilly .

variants.name: Reily
meanings: Irish: variant of   Riley  .

variants.name: Raleigh
meanings: English: habitational name from Raleigh (House) in Pilton (Devon), recorded as Radeleia in 1086 and Rawlegh in 1535. The placename probably derives from Old English rǣge ‘roe deer’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Irish: variant of   Riley  .

History: The English explorer Sir Walter Raleigh (1554–1618) was born in Hayes Barton, Devon, into a family of Devon gentry. He was related to most of the West Country's important families, including that of Sir Francis Drake. His half-brother was the explorer Sir Humphrey Gilbert. In 1578 Raleigh was granted a patent to explore and colonize “unknown lands” in America. In the 1580s he was granted extensive estates in Munster (Ireland), in reward for his suppression of the Desmond Rebellions.

variants.name: Rawley
meanings: Irish: variant of   Riley  .
English and Irish: variant of   Raleigh  .

variants.name: Rilea
meanings: Altered form of Irish   Riley  .

variants.name: Rahilly
meanings: Irish (Kerry and Cork): perhaps from Ó Raghailligh (see Reilly ), but more likely from the surname Ó Raithile ‘descendant of Raithile’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. This surname is common in Munster, where it is also Anglicized as O'Rahilly.

variants.name: Rowley
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of various places called Rowley or Rowly, such as Rowley Regis (Staffordshire), Rowley (Devon, Durham), Rowleygreen Farm (Hertfordshire), Rowly (Surrey), Rowley (East Yorkshire), Rowley, near Bardsey (Yorkshire), Rowley in Lepton (Yorkshire), and Rowley Hill (Essex). The placenames probably all derive from Old English rūh ‘rough’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’, though the East Yorkshire place may have been named with hlāw ‘mound, hill’ as the second element.
Irish: from Ó Roghallaigh, a variant of Ó Raghailligh. See Riley and O'Reilly .

variants.name: Rylee
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Riley or German Reile, Reihle, variants of Reil .

variants.name: Reel
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Raghaill ‘descendant of Raghall’, a short form of the personal name Raghailleach; see Riley and compare Riel .
Americanized form of German   Riehl  .

Flemish: from a short form of the ancient Germanic personal name Radilo, itself a short form of a compound name formed with rād ‘counsel, advice’ as the first element, for example Radolf (see Ralph ).

variants.name: Relihan
meanings: Irish (Cork): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Roileacháin ‘descendant of Roileachán’. Roileachán is a diminutive of the name Roghallach (see Riley ).

variants.name: Rielly
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Bridie.
English and Scottish: variant of   Riley  .
Irish: variant of   Reilly  ; see   O'Reilly  .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
meanings: Greek: Same as Catherine.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Katherine Riley was born in 1345. She married Richard Lister in 1370, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1403, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Katherine Riley est née en 1345. Elle a épousé Richard Lister en 1370, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1403, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Katherine Riley wurde 1345 geboren. Sie hat 1370 in England Richard Lister geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1403 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Derby, Derbyshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Katherine Riley è nata il nel 1345. Lei sposato Richard Lister nel 1370, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1403, nel Derby, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Rileyは1345年に生まれた。1370年にイギリスでRichard Listerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1403年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Riley(은)는 1345년 태어났다. 그녀는 1370년 영국에서 Richard Lister(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1403년 영국 더비실르 더비에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Katherine Riley nasceu em 1345. Ela casou-se com Richard Lister em 1370, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1403, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Katherine Riley родилась в 1345 г. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Lister в 1370 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1403 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Katherine Riley nació en 1345. Se casó con Richard Lister en 1370, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1403, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
